concept: Cough / Clear the Throat and Chest
description: To cough: the body clearing its own airways. Winter's soundtrack, the healer's clue.
sound_symbolism: 'ke' the catch in the throat, 'ho' the breath gathering, 'ta' the burst that clears it — the event in three beats.
grammatical_notes: Intransitive: 'shia sui shero to kehota.' (They coughed in the night.) The tender's report: 'lopia kehota. shia mokela po nai.' (The child coughs. They may be sick.)

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Listening to the household's coughs was the family's nightly triage — care begins in the ear.
